name: Miami Dade College

additional_materials: Placement testing for math and English (determines course level)

special_considerations: Open-access community college and one of the largest institutions of higher education in the US by enrollment (~165,000 students across 8 campuses)
Primarily offers associate degrees and certificates; select bachelor's degree programs available in high-demand fields
HSI: over 70% of students identify as Hispanic/Latino — one of the most diverse institutions in the country
Uses Florida's standard community college application; placement testing determines math and English course level, not admissions eligibility

financial_aid.notes: Open-access community college with very low tuition (~$3,300/yr for FL residents). Strong Pell/federal aid access. Florida Bright Futures scholarship covers tuition for eligible residents.
